visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a middle-aged Asian man with glasses and a newsboy cap sitting in an airplane seat, sipping from a white cup. The background shows the airplane cabin interior and a bright blue sky through the window. Branding for EVA Air and the flight model are overlaid on the screen. (2) The camera transitions to a wider shot of the business class cabin, highlighting the 1-2-1 reverse herringbone seating configuration. The man is shown lying flat on the seat covered with a blanket to demonstrate comfort. Close-up shots of the electronic seat control panel with illuminated icons are provided. (3) The creator showcases the storage amenities of the seat, opening a side latch to reveal a compartment containing headphones and charging cables. He then points to a magazine rack and a dedicated shoe storage space under the footrest, where a pair of sneakers is neatly placed. (4) The focus moves to the tech features, showing an 18-inch touchscreen display and a handheld remote. A close-up shot reveals the power outlet panel with universal sockets and USB ports. The man interacts with the screen, which displays flight information and safety messages. (5) The final phase features a detailed food review. The man uses chopsticks to eat Din Tai Fung soup dumplings from a bamboo steamer. Close-ups show various dishes including spicy beef tripe, chicken soup, and a silver ear fungus dessert. The video ends with him smiling while eating a dumpling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥 @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 我這次搭上. [Logo]: EVA AIR. [Slogan]: 長榮航空 787-10 商務艙. (2) [Subtitle]: 馬上給你也看一下. 第一個 你可以看到他的整個排列是. [Variety]: 反魚骨 1-2-1 佈局. (3) [Subtitle]: 每一個客人他都有直通走道. [Slogan]: 高隔板+座位傾斜設計. (4) [Subtitle]: 視角可以直接錯開. 單人座很適合那種獨旅的旅客. [Slogan]: 全長 193 公分. (5) [Slogan]: 長途航班也很好睡. [Slogan]: 全段電動調整. (6) [Subtitle]: 靠背 腳靠. 一鍵都可以回位. [Slogan]: 一鍵都可以回位. (7) [Subtitle]: 輕鬆可以回到直立 或者是平躺. [Slogan]: 閉合式側邊儲物盒. (8) [Slogan]: 大型雜誌槽. [Slogan]: 置物空間非常足夠!. [Slogan]: 專屬鞋位空間. (9) [Subtitle]: 螢幕部分它有 18 吋的高解析度出控螢幕. [Slogan]: 18 吋高解析觸控螢幕. (10) [Slogan]: 觸控 + 遙控雙操作. [Slogan]: 110V/220V 自動切換. [Slogan]: 不用帶任何的轉接器. (11) [Subtitle]: 但我今天最重要就是要帶大家在高空吃一下. [Slogan]: 鼎泰豐 DIN TAI FUNG. (12) [Subtitle]: 開場是它三道的開胃小菜. [Slogan]: 香辣牛肚. [Slogan]: 糖醋番茄乾. (13) [Subtitle]: 主角當然就是這鼎泰豐經典小籠包. [Slogan]: 經典小籠包. [Slogan]: 皮薄. [Slogan]: 湯汁很多. (14) [Variety]: 一樣很鮮美!!. [Slogan]: 元盅雞湯. (15) [Slogan]: 荔枝蜜銀耳湯. [Slogan]: 台灣味 真的直接帶上天!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female flight attendant walking past in the background at 0:08
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian man with short hair, wearing a beige and brown newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a white t-shirt. He has a wooden bead bracelet on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Boeing 787-10 business class cabin with modern grey and brown seating. Features include lie-flat seats, modular privacy walls, storage compartments, and a large entertainment screen. The windows show the sky and clouds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with the narrator's enthusiastic voice and a mid-tempo, happy acoustic BGM. A subtle slurping sound is audible as he drinks. The engine hum of the airplane provides a constant but very faint background ambient texture while the voice remains front and center. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound triggers as text appears on the screen, followed by the narrator's fast-paced explanation of the cabin layout. The music maintains a steady rhythm with clear piano notes. Every few seconds, digital UI 'pop' sounds accentuate the visual highlights. (3) A mechanical click is heard as the narrator points at the seat control panel. Fabric rustling and a soft thump occur when the man lies down on the bed. The narrator's tone is consistently upbeat and promotional, with clear articulation and high emotional valence. (4) During the food review, the clinking of ceramic bowls and the lid of the bamboo steamer opening create a rich soundscape. The narrator uses more rising intonations to express excitement about the taste. The BGM volume dips slightly to allow the incidental eating sounds to be heard. (5) The final phase concludes with a bright 'ding' sound effect as the slogan is displayed. The narrator's speech ends on a high, energetic note. The music swells for a brief moment before fading out to a clean stop alongside the video ending.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Service/Food Experience -> Summary Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy travel and lifestyle vlog aimed at showcasing the luxury features of EVA Air's Boeing 787-10 business class. By combining a technical walkthrough of the seat functions and tech amenities with a sensory food review of the Din Tai Fung partnership, the creator intends to promote the premium flight experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the airline logo, specific mentions of the aircraft model, and a detailed review of the co-branded Din Tai Fung meal service.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features high production value typical of tech/lifestyle influencers, with rapid cuts and information-dense overlays synchronized with audio cues.
